2137357560.detail_html:
Specifications:


Size:1-stage/2-stage/3-stage





Material: TPE





Color: transparent





Size: 7x6x2.9cm





Weight: 120g


Who suitable for use?


1. The teeth are irregular and there is enough space between the teeth.





2. Patients whose teeth rebound after orthodontic treatment.





3. After steel wire is used, it's as a dental retainer.





4. Tooth protrusion and lightly crowding, not suitable for patients with severe teeth crowding.





5. Can also be used to prevent molars.





Tips:


* First stage is soft, for the first stage, use 1 month.





* Second stage is moderate, for the second stage, 2-4 months.





* Third stage is hard, for the third stage, use 5-8 months.





* The calibration process is divided into three phases. In the first stage for 1 month, you can gradually use the Second stage teeth brace together.





* Use the Second stage teeth brace during the day and The first stage at night. Once it's perfect for the Second stage teeth brace, you can use the Third stage together.





* Use the Third stage during the day and the Second stage at night. It is usually worn every day and there will be a noticeable improvement in 4 to 6 months.





Take a note:





1. Cannot be used interchangeably to prevent cross-infection





2. Can not be placed in the microwave disinfection





3. When you use the product, relax and close your mouth. Do not forcefully chew the braces.





4. It is not recommended to use under abnormal conditions such as irregular denture planting





5. During wearing, avoid eating hard food





6.Do not use hot water to clean, please use cold water to soak for 15-30 minutes, then clean with a toothbrush and toothpaste





7.Soreness, mucosal damage, etc. unsuitable after using braces for the first time will disappear within 5-7 days. If you feel strong unsuitability, it is recommended to stop using it.





8.Don't bite too tight at the beginning, slowly increase the strength of the bite; If you feel uncomfortable, you can take it off first, take a rest and then wear it; Wear 1-2 hours a day after adaptation, and then extend the wearing time.





Precautions:





1. This product can effectively prevent children from gnawing teeth, irregular teeth, restoring cavities and irregular teeth.





2. Because the teeth are not in a state that can be repaired in one day, the use of this product needs to be sustained and cannot be abandoned halfway.





3. There are three types of this product in total. If you need to restore a neat tooth, you need to use it from the first stage to the third stage. Therefore, it is recommended that you directly purchase the three-stage orthodontic braces at one time.





4. The product needs to be used continuously during the day and night. Use 2-3 hours during the day and 8 hours for sleep at night.

3583516076.detail_html:
🦷 20 Pcs Dental Brackets Orthodontic Brace Metal Monoblock Mini Roth MBT 022 345 Hook Stainless Steel 17-4 Low Friction Teeth Treatment Materials




✅ Specifications




🔹 Product Name: Dental Brackets (Orthodontic Brace Metal Bracket)




🔹 Quantity: 20 Pcs/pack




🔹 Type: Monoblock Mini




🔹 Material: Stainless Steel 17-4




🔹 Model: Roth 022 MBT 022




🔹 Hook Configuration: 345 Hook




🔹 Base Design: Crossed Slot Base




🔹 Slot Feature: Smooth Wire Slot




🔹 Purpose: Used In Orthodontic Treatment To Fix Arch Wires For Teeth Alignment Correction




✅ Key Features




🔹 High-Quality Material: Made Of 17-4 Stainless Steel With Smooth Surface Low Friction Reducing Irritation To Gums And Oral Mucosa




🔹 One-Piece Construction: Never Drops From The Pad When Debonding Stable Structure With Long Service Life




🔹 Strong Bonding Strength: Crossed Slot Base Increases Bonding Area With Tooth Surface Enhancing Bonding Strength And Reducing Bracket Falling Risk




🔹 Comfort And Safety: Ultra-Smooth Strong Ball Hooks Design Improves Patient Comfort And Ensures Secure Engagement Of Elastics




🔹 Low Friction Slot: Smooth Wire Slot Reduces Friction With Arch Wire Facilitating Wire Sliding And Improving Tooth Movement Efficiency




✅ Applications




🔹 Fixed Orthodontic Treatment: Works With Orthodontic Arch Wires To Provide Continuous Correction Force Suitable For Crowded Sparse Protruding And Other Malocclusions




🔹 Adolescent Orthodontics: Mini Design Fits Adolescent Tooth Morphology Reduces Oral Foreign Body Sensation And Improves Wearing Comfort




🔹 Adult Orthodontics: Metal Material With High Strength Meets The Force Requirements For Adult Teeth Correction Suitable For Complex Cases




🔹 Roth/MBT Techniques: Compatible With Roth And MBT Mainstream Orthodontic Systems Meeting Different Doctors' Treatment Habits




🔹 Multi-Tooth Position Use: 345 Hook Design Adapts To Multiple Tooth Positions Facilitating Auxiliary Force Application During Correction




✅ Usage Guide




🔹 Model Selection: Choose The Corresponding Model According To Orthodontic System (Roth Or MBT) And Patient's Tooth Condition 022 Size Is Suitable For Regular Correction Needs




🔹 Bonding Method: After Cleaning The Tooth Surface Use Orthodontic Adhesive To Precisely Position And Bond The Bracket To The Crown Surface Ensuring Correct Placement




🔹 Daily Maintenance: Patients Should Keep Oral Cavity Clean Use Special Orthodontic Toothbrush To Clean Around Brackets Avoid Food Residue Accumulation




🔹 Regular Inspection: Return For Follow-Up Every 4-6 Weeks Doctors Adjust Arch Wire Force Check If Brackets Are Loose And Handle Abnormalities In Time




💡 NOTES




🔹 This Product Is For Professional Medical Staff Only Relevant Medical Qualification Certificates May Be Required Before Purchase And Use Follow Local Regulations




🔹 Manual Measurement Has 1-3mm Error Which Is Normal And Does Not Affect Use Effect




🔹 Due To Shooting Light And Monitor Differences There May Be Slight Color Difference In Products Please Refer To The Actual Item




🔹 Patients Should Avoid Chewing Hard Or Sticky Foods During Wearing To Prevent Brackets From Falling Off Or Being Damaged




🔹 If Brackets Are Loose Or Hooks Are Deformed Contact Doctors In Time To Avoid Affecting Correction Progress




📦 Packing List




🔹 20Pcs/pack Dental Brackets

product.highlights:
• END THE PAIN! - You know what happens when your knee buckles? It hurts. A lot! Buzesty Hinged Knee Brace alleviates pain from knee injuries like ACL, MCL & meniscus tears, strains and sprains and others. Get through your day without pain and discomfort.
  • SUPPORT YOU BADLY NEED! Buzesty knee brace provides lateral support, keeps your kneecap in place, and still allows full range of motion. It supports underlying tendons and muscles and lets you carry out your daily tasks. Protect yourself from further injury.
  • YOU DESERVE THE BEST - Expertly engineered with two(!) alluminium hinges (1 on each side) and an open patella design - a complete knee support solution! Makes sure your muscles and tendons fully supported so you can heal faster.
  • VERSATILE, PRACTICAL, INTUITIVE - Easy on and off. Adjustable to any fit. Four strong velcro straps secure the Buzesty Knee Brace and keep it exactly in position no matter how much you move around. Total knee support without slipping or bunching.
  • ORDER NOW - You have no risk our 100% happiness guarantee!

product.desc:
Buzesty Back Brace for Lower Back with Support System for men and Women -Lumbar Support Brace for Herniated Disc Lower Back Brace for Sciatica, Scoliosis,Heavy Lifting and Work

Instant Back Pain Relief - Different from other ordinary back braces,our lower back brace has a specially designed 3D bionic lumbar pad and the raised center part has just the right elasticity,which reduces lumbar muscle fatigue and tension by providing the right support and protection,quickly relieves back pain,especially for herniated lumbar discs,sciatica,spinal stenosis,scoliosis,and other acute ( or chronic) back pain and aches,after wearing it,we can feel its amazing effect.
product.highlights:
• BACK SUPPORT & STABILITY：Replicates the natural curvature of the spine, directly targeting your area of pain to ensure relief for people with herniated or protruding discs, sciatica, sore lower back muscles, and many other acute (or chronic) lumbar spine problems.Lumbar Supports help you maintain proper posture while sitting, standing, cleaning, organizing or lifting goods, and prevent strains while working out.
  • LOWER BACK ERGONOMIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: 4-in-2 pull-back elastic straps + 3D curvature support panels and memory brackets in the back + steel springs on both sides + ABS support strips in the front. We carefully select the most suitable material for each body part's needs, to systematically and comprehensively support our lumbar, to alleviate our back pain problems and to preserve our flexibility in bending at work
  • COMFORTABLE & BREATHABLE: The unique one-piece knit process allows the braces to conform to the curves of our backs and is hard-wearing without losing elasticity.3D openwork knit process provides excellent breathability and comfort. We can wear it all day long
  • EXTRA SUPPORT: 2 pull-back elastic bands on each side make it easy to adjust the pressure even for people with hand pain, and 4 split-compression elastic bands spread the pressure.The back brace for lower back pain provides additional compression and support,helps relieve muscle strains, supports spinal alignment, and reduces the risk of injury
  • Please measure the circumference of your belly according to the illustration. If you want to wear this back braces over your winter clothes, choose a size larger than your net waist circumference.Do not assume you know your size.

2572930460.title: NEENCA Shoulder Support Brace with Pressure Pad for Men Women, Adjustable Shoulder Brace for Torn Rotator Cuff, Tendonitis, Dislocation, AC Joint, Bursitis, Labrum Tear, Pain, Fits Right or Left Shoulder
2572930460.detail_text: Great Design: Our shoulder brace can be used for both RIGHT and LEFT shoulder, easily adjustable, strong velcro straps and high quality plastic buckle design for adjusting on right or left shoulder, support to be fit on your shoulder, users can adjust the length in accordance with individual demands, both suit for men and women. Functions of Shoulder Brace Support: Speed up the recovery process Compressing the shoulder joint to reduce inflammation Keeping the shoulder elevated to improve blood flow and aid healing Reducing shoulder instability to allow injuries to heal more quickly and in the right position Allowing you to adjust the temperature of your brace by hot or cold therapy (not include ice/heat pack) Provide compression, which may enhance the receptors in your skin and help your brain better understand the position of your shoulder
2572930460.detail_html:
Great Design:

Our shoulder brace can be used for both RIGHT and LEFT shoulder, easily adjustable, strong velcro straps and high quality plastic buckle design for adjusting on right or left shoulder, support to be fit on your shoulder, users can adjust the length in accordance with individual demands, both suit for men and women.

product.highlights:
• Patented Hinged Knee Brace with Removable Dual Side Copper Stabilizers & Patella Gel Pad, Medical Knee Support with Open Patella and Back Design. Wrap around the patella to enhance the stability of your knee and relax tendons, avoid pulling, prevent muscle strain. Medical knee brace for knee pain, meniscus tear, arthritis, ACL, PCL, MCL, joint pain relief, Sprains, Strains, sports injury recovery and so on.
